expectations.text: Does NOT create a knowledge capture plan
expectations.evidence: Output is titled 'Knowledge Skill — Policy Lookup Request (Negative Case)'. States: 'This query falls outside the scope of the /knowledge skill.' No knowledge capture plan, risk assessment, or interview guide generated.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for policy queries
expectations.evidence: Recommends: 'Use the /policy-lookup skill (if available) — this is the skill the /knowledge description explicitly recommends for policy and FAQ queries.' Also suggests employee handbook and HR team as alternatives.

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to answer the policy question from general knowledge
expectations.evidence: No maternity leave policy information, weeks, or pay details provided. Output explicitly states: 'No policy data source: The /knowledge skill does not contain or reference company policy documents.' Redirects to authoritative sources only.
